title: Voltage imbalance limit
summary: Maximum allowed voltage imbalance is 2%
evidence_quote: 最大允许的不平衡电压为  ％

title: Low pressure cut-out
summary: Low pressure switch cuts out at 25±4 psig (0.172±0.028 MPa) and resets at 45±6 psig (0.310±0.041 MPa)

structured_payload.value: cut-out 25±4 psig (0.172±0.028 MPa), reset 45±6 psig (0.310±0.041 MPa)

evidence_quote: 操作压力低于   ±4psig（0.0  ±0.0   Mpa）以下时，即停止压缩机的运行，操作压力达到   ±  psig （0.1  ±0.04 Mpa）时，即自动复位。

title: High pressure cut-out
summary: High pressure switch cuts out at 400±10 psig (2.76±0.069 MPa) and resets at 250±15 psig (1.72±0.103 MPa)
evidence_quote: 高压压力大于 400±10 psig （ .  ±0.0  Mpa） 以上是，即停止压缩机的运转，压力降低到   0±1  psig （1.  ±0.103Mpa） 时，即自动复位。

title: Winter antifreeze setpoint
summary: Winter antifreeze function activates when load side water temperature drops below the winter antifreeze set temperature minus 1°C
evidence_quote: 当使用侧水温低于冬季防冻设定温度减一度时，机组自动启动进行防冻运行

title: Winter shutdown drain procedure
summary: During winter non-use or long-term shutdown, drain water from the unit at the indicated positions to prevent heat exchanger freeze damage.

structured_payload.procedure: Drain water from unit at indicated positions

evidence_quote: 冬季不使用或长期停机时， 应按左图所示位置对机组进行放水。 确保换热器不会被冻裂。

title: Water quality limits
summary: Water quality limits: total hardness < 350 ppm, pH 7-8.5, H2S < 1 ppm, sulfate < 25 ppm, chloride < 150 ppm, CO2 < 50 ppm, TDS < 1000 ppm

structured_payload.value: total hardness < 350 ppm, pH 7-8.5, H2S < 1 ppm, sulfate < 25 ppm, chloride < 150 ppm, CO2 < 50 ppm, TDS < 1000 ppm

evidence_quote:
钙镁总硬度 小于 3 0ppm
PH  - . 
硫化氢 小于 1ppm
硫酸盐 小于   ppm
氯化物 小于 1  ppm
CO  小于   ppm
可溶物总和 TDS小于 1000ppm

title: Minimum service clearance
summary: Minimum service clearance: front 600 mm, rear 150 mm, top 20 mm

structured_payload.guidance: Minimum service clearance: front 600 mm, rear 150 mm, top 20 mm

evidence_quote:
机器前方最小维修空间600
机器后方最小维修空间 150
最小维修空间（上面）20

title: Single compressor cooling operation
summary: On start, source side water valve opens, pump runs. Compressor starts when load side return water temperature exceeds setpoint. Pump and valve remain on unless unit is turned off.

structured_payload.sequence: Start: source water valve open, pump on. Compressor on when return water temp > setpoint. Pump and valve stay on until unit off.

evidence_quote: 启动机组时， 源侧水阀接通， 随后水泵运行。 当负荷侧回水温度高于设定值时，开启机组； 负荷满足后机组关闭。除非关闭机组， 水泵会一直运转， 水阀也保持开启。

title: Dual compressor cooling operation
summary: On start, source side water valve opens, pump runs. One compressor starts if return water temp exceeds setpoint; second starts if load is high. Compressors stage off as load decreases. Pump and valve remain on unless unit is turned off.

structured_payload.sequence: Start: source water valve open, pump on. Compressors stage on/off based on return water temp vs setpoint. Pump and valve stay on until unit off.

evidence_quote: 启动机组时， 源侧水阀接通， 随后水泵运行。 当负荷侧回水温度高于设定回水温度时， 启动一台压缩机， 如果负荷较大， 两台压缩机都启动运行。 回水温度满足设定要求后， 关闭一台压缩机，如果负荷继续降低， 两台压缩机都将关闭。除非关闭机组， 水泵会一直运转， 水阀也保持开启。

title: Flow switch setting
summary: Flow switch must be set to open when water flow drops below 50% of system full flow
evidence_quote: 其设定值必须在水量低于系统设定全流量的  0%时，立即停止压缩机运转。

title: Power supply voltage tolerance
summary: Power supply voltage must be within ±10% of nameplate rating

structured_payload.guidance: Power supply voltage must be within ±10% of nameplate rating

evidence_quote: 电源电压应在标准值的 ±10%范围内变化。

title: Preheat requirement before startup in cold weather
summary: In winter when ambient temperature is below 1°C, do not cut off power and preheat the unit for 24 hours before startup to avoid compressor damage.

structured_payload.guidance: When ambient temperature < 1°C, keep power on and preheat unit for 24 hours before startup.

evidence_quote: 冬季在环境温度低于 1 ℃时，请不要切断电源， 并在开机前提前  4 小时预热机组， 否则会损坏压缩机。
